rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Bypassing Security Controls - Command Shell

rules.rule_text:
title: Bypassing Security Controls - Command Shell
id: 2aaf3922-0a8b-4b7b-9c10-ea552bdff707
status: experimental
description: "Adversaries bypass controls using the Windows Command Shell in a plethora\
  \ of ways, \nbut you can detect the one we see most often with a simple combination\
  \ of process \nexecution and a corresponding command line. Part of the RedCanary\
  \ 2024 Threat \nDetection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059
- attack.t1059.003
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1202
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - bypass
    - -exec
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
